title: Visual Netherite
description: Adds Gold and Diamond Bits into Netherite!
body:
Visual Netherite
-
A small pack I made that changes all netherite things to have diamond and gold chunks in them to show what goes into making netherite armor. Check out Gallery for pictures!


Contact me on Discord [@beyondtheend](https://discord.com/users/766257043648544779)
